overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character farming at a rural homestead during golden hour. The camera slowly orbits clockwise around the stationary character as they work the soil with a hoe, revealing a wooden farmhouse and wagon in the pastoral setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmyard with crop patch and wooden house

agents.ego_description: repeatedly swinging a hoe to till the soil in a crop patch beside a wooden farmhouse

entered.detail: weathered wooden homestead with porch and gabled roof
rustic wooden fence running along the property line
dense cluster of tall green crops growing in tilled rows
long-handled farming tool held by the character

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits slowly around a character working in a farmyard during golden hour. A wooden farmhouse stands to the left while the character tills a crop patch on the right. Warm sunlight bathes the scene from behind, casting long shadows across the dirt and grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmyard with wooden wagon and crop patch

events.description: character stops hoeing and stands up straight, completing the farming animation

agents.ego_description: continuing to work the soil with a hoe, then standing upright and pausing

entered.detail: old-fashioned wooden farm wagon with large spoked wheels

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its clockwise orbit, a wooden farm wagon comes into view on the left while the farmhouse shifts to the right side of the frame. The character continues tilling the soil in the crop patch, then stops and stands up straight, holding the hoe, as the golden hour light illuminates the rural scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, clockwise orbit around a character farming in a rural yard, shifting the perspective from a view of the farmhouse to one of the farm equipment. It begins with the character tilling a crop patch on the right while a wooden farmhouse stands to the left, all bathed in the warm, low-angle sunlight of golden hour. As the camera continues its steady rotation, the farmhouse shifts toward the right side of the frame, allowing a wooden farm wagon to emerge into view on the left. The scene then culminates as the character stops their work and stands upright with the hoe, fully illuminated by the golden light against the pastoral backdrop.
